seoTitle: Orient Point vs Orton Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Orient Point and Orton Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Orient Point vs Orton Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Orient Point and Orton Park.
heading: Orient Point vs Orton Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Orient Point, New South Wales and Orton Park, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Orton Park has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Orient Point (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Orient Point or Orton Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Orient Point has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Orton Park scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Orient Point scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Orton Park scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Orient Point or Orton Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Orton Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
